name: Sponge
description:
A Vladof Seraph absorb shield built around turning incoming bullets into ammo. It has no exclusive effect beyond its absorb behavior, but it usually comes with solid capacity and can roll Maliwan capacitors for elemental resistance.

Its absorb rate depends heavily on its parts. Bandit combinations tend to be lower, while heavy Maliwan setups can reach very high absorption at the cost of capacity and recharge performance.

special.description: Its absorb chance varies heavily by parts, ranging from modest rolls to very high absorption on the right setup.
special.title: Highly absorbent!

notes: Its value depends heavily on the exact part roll, since that determines whether it leans toward raw absorb chance or more balanced shield stats.
abilities: Absorbed ammo is added to your backpack.
